'''Hydrospeare Corporation''' was the manufacturer of numerous aquatic vehicles, weapons, and other equipment.<ref name="air" />

Their headquarters were located on the planet [[Kabaira]]. Their biggest customer was the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]].

Around [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], the Empire had signed two dozens of new contracts with Hydrospeare for the development of new aquatic weapons and combat vehicles. This led to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] command believing that the Empire was planning a recovery of [[Dac/Legends|Dac]].<ref name="air" />

Due to the quality of its products, the Rebel Alliance considered the company a threat. [[Design Team Beta]], an elite team of genii working for Hydrospeare, was specially feared.<ref name="air" />

==Modification packages==
Hydrospeare was famous because of its "modification packages". The Design Team Beta took valid vehicles from other companies, and developed the "packages" to make them aquatic. At least three of the vehicles had been accepted by the Empire.<ref name="air" />

*[[Aquadon CAVa 400]]
*[[Combat Aquaspeeder|Aquadon Combat Aquaspeeder]]
*[[Aquatic Terrain Armored Transport|AT-AT swimmer]]
